name: Bean Lasagne
recipeIngredient: 2 15 Oz. Cans Red Beans, drained and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the sauce by heating the oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Sauté the garlic and onions for about a minute until fragrant.
2. Add the chopped red beans, green chilies, and tomato puree to the skillet. Stir to combine.
3. Cook the mixture for several minutes until heated through.
4. Stir in the oregano, basil, and pepper. Bring the sauce to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
5. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. To assemble the lasagne, spread a thin layer of sauce on the bottom of a 9 x 13-inch baking dish.
7. Arrange three noodles evenly over the sauce.
8. Spread one-third of the sauce over the noodles, followed by half of the ricotta cheese, half of the mozzarella cheese, and 1/4 cup grated Parmesan cheese.
9. Repeat steps 6-8 with another layer of noodles, sauce, cheeses, and Parmesan.
10. Finish with a final layer of noodles and sauce, then top with remaining Parmesan cheese.
11. Cover the dish with foil and bake for 25 minutes in the preheated oven.
12. Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 15 minutes until bubbling and lightly browned on top.
